name: QXO, Inc.
description: QXO, Inc. is a leading, tech-enabled distributor of commercial and residential building products, including roofing, siding, windows, decking, insulation, and waterproofing systems. Headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut, the company serves a vast network of contractors and homebuilders across North America. Under the leadership of Chairman and CEO Brad Jacobs, QXO is aggressively expanding its market presence through a strategic acquisition-led growth model, aiming to modernize the building products distribution industry by leveraging cutting-edge technology and operational efficiency to deliver superior service and value to its customers and stakeholders.
